rawFiles.name: wikidata-airport-enrichment-candidates.json
rawFiles.notes: Generated by a Wikidata SPARQL query against existing transport external identifiers in the local data-automation output directory.

transforms: Query Wikidata for items matching existing IATA, ICAO, UN/LOCODE, and GeoNames identifiers.
Accept only existing airport records whose Wikidata item matches by both IATA and ICAO code.
Add Wikidata IDs and dated source references to accepted airport records.
Hold city/locality, port, single-code, and military-looking matches for maintainer review.
reviewNotes: Imported 6 Wikidata airport identifier enrichments. Held 13 matched Wikidata items for review because they were city/locality items, port/GeoNames identity matches, single-code airport matches, or military-looking airport matches.
